reviewer_role: repository maintainer, semantic owner, and test-evidence reviewer
decision_recording: explicit maintainer decision summarized without committing a private chat transcript
timing: post-merge approval recorded before public claim promotion
reviewed_scope: repository-local WP0 controls shipped with the WP1 candidate
WP1 ResourceWireV1 canonical codec and reject precedence
WP1 tests, vectors, and scoped assurance evidence
evidence_reviewed: hosted quality, fuzz-smoke, supply-chain, dependency-review, and assurance checks for pull request 1
followups: retain the scoped full-codec Kani gap until a bounded functional harness is viable
retain reviewed coverage and mutation exclusions
keep nightly fuzz evidence distinct from pull-request smoke evidence
complete host branch controls, private vulnerability reporting, and release-environment controls
complete cargo-vet, SBOM, CBOM, reproducibility, provenance, and external audit work before any release claim
non_claims: the review does not cover ResourceV1 semantic construction
the review does not cover policy, verifier, transition, state, persistence, commit, proof, or application code
the review does not establish a stable package-wide ABI
the review is not an independent external security review
the review does not establish production readiness
